testcase.name: MP_VAC_TS001

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: //input[@placeholder='Enter Property Owner']' (tried for 30 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)
